transcript.text:
She's filming something
Aren't you... Ms. Tzuyang??
Yes I am
[Hansarang Mountain Club X Tzuyang] (A group of comedians)
Hello everyone
I'm here in front of a sushi place in Ulleung Island
I requested an order of 100 sushi
And they accepted
So I'll be eating that today
[Gyeongsangbuk-do, Ulleung-gun] [Dokdo Chobap Chamchi]
Hello~!
[100 sushi]
First sushi meal ever since I got here
Very curious
Bon appetit!
1 egg sushi

[What's that sound?]
She must be filming something
[Today's special guests: Hansarang Mountain Club] (A group of comedians)
Her party must not be here yet
So that's how mukbang works
Let's ask for recommendations
Where are you from? KBS? (broadcasting company)
No, not that I do YouTube
Aren't you... Ms.Tzuyang?
Yes I am Hello
Ms. Tzuyang?
Who's that? Is she famous?
She's very famous amongst the students
Is that so?
Her name is Tzuyang?
It's not my name It's just a nickname

Tzuyang? So Ms. Tzu
Ms. Tzu?
Tzuyang is really good at eating
She eats like 30 packs of ramyun noodles
You must've gotten confused her with someone else
Look how frail she is Where would all of that go? Quit lying
I was skeptical at first too
But she really eats everything
Stop lying
He's the walking elephant
Then let's see who can eat more
Yeah, make a bet so that the loser pays the bill
Would you like to do that?
You will regret it Are you sure?
You can only eat 30 servings
What are you talking about?

He can eat more than her probably
Way more than Tzu
Ms. Tzu needs to eat some food
Then would you like to compete?
Yeah, let's do it
Excuse me, we'll take 100 sushi as well
You better not go back on your word after you lose!
[What a funny situation this is!]
100 sushi coming up
[This is a bit tiring]
[Everyone's getting busy]
[A fire massage]
[100 sushi finished!]
[Let the competition begin!]
This is a bit more than I thought
Right, this is a lot

Did they catch all the fish in the ocean?
How many fish is this?
We can win!
She's all bones
We'll win for sure
So you guys will be switching off?
Yes sure It'll be over too soon
Really?
Thank you
Do you want a shot? (soy sauce)
I already have some
Start?
[Start!]
Go ahead and start
Don't overdo it
Ms. Tzu too! Best of luck

That's a good bite
Can we get some digestion pills?
This guy can even eat rocks
What if she gets sick?
Will you be okay?
Did we even start yet?
I love the ambition
Looking good!
It's tasty
Salmon sushi
It's really moist and delicious
Hey you
You need to chew your food more A 100 times before you swallow
You'll regret it when you get older
He's right Chew 100 times
Put that down!

[Pissed off]
She's still young
[I'm going my way]
[Same food, different temperature]
Why does it feel like you've slowed down a lot?
[She's just happy]
What's going on?
She will regret it later
The first impression is everything
Salmon too
Tzuyang is #1 in our country
Is the food not good?
Do you melt it in your mouth?
-Chew a little -I am!
About 10 times
She's good at eating

Can I change up something?
I can eat all the egg sushi
Yeah do that I don't eat eggs
It's all yours
I'll eat whatever I can here
[Slow down, you'll get sick]
Let's change it up
I can eat the fish well
[They're pissed off now]
Then what are you going to eat?
I'll gather all the rice in 1 place
Finish that if you dipped the soy sauce already
Hurry up and eat He's eating it weird
I'm losing my appetite
[They're making her laugh hysterically]
Get out of here

[Change of players]
He couldn't even finish 1 row
Mr. Jung is good at eating what he likes
This stuff is really delicious
Right?
It just keeps going in Really tasty
Look at her Tzu Tzu...
What? She's almost half done already
What did the first guy even eat?
It's just the speed that gets me I can finish it all
You've lost all credibility
Let's see
[He's doing better!]
Chew a lot
This red piece is tuna, right?
Yes, tuna

This is exceptional And that guy ate it all
But he's doing well He's doing a good job
Hey, Tzuyang
Did you starve for days?
No, I had breakfast this morning
[This is someone that just had a meal]
You're good at eating
Yes, he's good
Yes, I've been hungry
Mr. Jung is good at eating food and also criticism
So he'll live a long life
Longer than a tortoise
They talk like that but they're good people
They take care of their friends
They're not bad people
This is really delicious

It's yummy!
3 rows already? 4 rows?!
Hurry it up
I will just eat what I can
The first guy really didn't eat anything though
Can you give us some tips?
Just eat and enjoy
Having her eat well keeps me going too
[He's really doing well]
What the heck?
You ate a lot, Mr. Jung
You really did
I'm done after this
It says Uni-something on your sweater Are you a student?
Psik University (Their YouTube Channel)
Psik University?

That's a good school
What do you mean? It's a crappy school
Get over here Mr. Jung
This is really tasty
[The difference is too much]
Did she eat half? No, 5 rows
[Switch]
[Chairman Kim]
He eats less than a 3-year-old
He's a small eater
That's what they call him
I'm about to eat Don't say that
Okay hurry and eat
Don't ruin my mood when I'm eating
He's already 80% full right now
Now he's over-eating

An ant would eat more than you
He's standing up so he can stop eating
How do you do Mukbang?
-Show them the food -Show it?
Look
You need to put the hand behind
Look
For size comparison
He's really full right now
My son does YouTube too
Who is it?
His name is Minsoo
It's not doing too well
How can he get as popular as you? Does he need to eat a lot?
There's a possibility if he can eat a lot
Minsoo can't eat a lot either

His thumb is always bleeding
He constantly stabs it
Don't talk about my son
Don't you dare
Okay, look forward
Here, I'm eating this Look
[When did she eat all of that?]
How full are you? Just be honest with us
90%
This sushi is delicious
[Continuing her mukbang in the midst of all the chaos]
She's not leaving a single grain of rice behind
What are you doing?
This is all memories
Take it again since she's famous
She's a famous person

[That camera angle though]
I'm eating the octopus now
He's eating a lot
He might have indigestion
Are you okay?
[Almost at a stomach ache]
[The last player enters the arena]
I edit YouTube videos and stuff
There needs to be an opening comment
Hello lovely fans in YouTube
This is Yong Gil Bae
Today, we're gonna eat sushi
Ulleungdo sushi
Okay, let's go
Salmon salmon okay
What's salmon?

Salmosa fish?
What's that in English?
This is eel
Fight fire with fire (Play on words)
They put some spice in the eel sauce
[He has almost double the amount]
The total is 400,000 Won (~$340 USD)
What are you doing? Hurry and eat
You can do it!
Hey Ms. Tzu,
How do you keep up with all the food costs as a college student?
Wait a sec,
How can a college student pay for all this food?
Yes, give her some money
Oops, wrong bill
I make money with YouTube

That won't be much!
Thank you!
[Worn out]
[She's perfectly fine]
Are you okay?
She has 1 row left
Eat 2 pieces at a time now
[The crowd is enjoying the show]
[What are they doing?]
[I'll let you catch up]
-Hurry and eat -I'm done
Same
I'll eat the good stuff only
I'll just finish it
The elders are not finished yet!
How dare you put down your chopsticks first!

I've eaten too much
She left nothing behind
This can't be real
Here, have a bite
Can I eat this?
[Finished]
[Tzuyang wins, as we all expected]
You guys ate a lot though
But I win
Take care of the bill, we're heading out
You ate a lot
[Money from his wallet]
Give it all to her Everything. All of it.
That's incredible though
Let's give her a round of applause
[Good job everyone]

Thank you for the meal
Yeah sure
Clap for Tzuyang
You're amazing
Good luck to you
Live with passion
Be thankful to be eating this kind of food
Be grateful
Hey, stop now
Show lots of love for Ms.Tzu's YouTube channel
Subscribe, like, and share, please
Thank you
Let's go
[A special thanks to Psik University's Hansarang Mountain Club]
To-go the leftovers for us
I got the chance to eat delicious foods with Psik University's Hansarang Mountain Club comedian ahjussis

I had a great time
Thanks everyone!
[Extra footage]
Is 400,000 Won a joke to you?
Let's stay here until the boat comes And make a run for it on the boat
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
